description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a uniform, matte gray fabric. The sofa features three prominent seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all of which are rectangular and appear to be firmly attached. The right side of the sofa extends into a chaise lounge, providing ample space for reclining. The armrests are straight, blocky, and of equal height to the backrest, giving the sofa a clean, geometric profile. The base of the sofa is solid and continuous, with no visible legs, suggesting a low-profile, grounded appearance. The upholstery is smooth and unadorned, with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa in matte gray fabric with a chaise lounge and blocky armrests. The design is modern, with smooth, uniform cushions and a solid base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the chaise lounge and the solid, blocky armrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three seat and back cushions, the L-shaped layout, and the chaise extension on the right.
description_view_2: Side view of the main seating section, showing the straight backrest and the continuous base.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full length of the backrest and the sofa's solid, uninterrupted back profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, rectangular seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all attached and uniform in size, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, block-style armrests at both ends, equal in height to the backrest, with no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base is solid and continuous, giving a grounded, low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with three attached, uniform cushions, continuous along both sections of the sofa.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid matte gray fabric with a smooth, untextured surface and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
